title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ARTIFICIAL BREEDING CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROXAS, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4745 / 69 OG No. 7, 1154-30 (February 12, 1973)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6600, October 23, 1972 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN ARTIFICIAL BREEDING CENTER IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROXAS, PROVINCE OF ORIENTAL MINDORO, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There is hereby established, under the supervision of the Bureau of Animal Industry, an artificial breeding center in the Municipality of Roxas, Province of Oriental Mindoro, at a site to be selected by the Director of Animal Industry through donation, to be known as the Roxas Artificial Breeding Center.

SEC. 2. The sum of one hundred fifty thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the construction of office-laboratory building, animal sheds, equipment, supplies and materials and such other expenses as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

GIL J. PUYAT

CORNELIO T. VILLAREAL

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

Finally passed by the Senate on September 11, 1972.

This Act, which originated in the House of Representatives, was

finally passed by the same on May 12, 1972.

ELISEO M. TENZA

INOCENCIO B. PAREJA

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House Representatives

Approved: October 23, 1972

FERDINAND E. MARCOS

President of the Philippines
